post.description:
Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under settings service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Sets the settings specific to an organization.
 Organization scopes usernames defines that the usernames have to be unique in the organization scope, can only be changed if the usernames of the users are unique in the scope.

 Required permissions:
   - `iam.policy.write`

delete.description:
Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under settings service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Delete the settings specific to an organization.

 Required permissions:
   - `iam.policy.delete`

post.description:
Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under settings service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Returns a list of organization settings.

 Required permission:
   - `iam.policy.read`
   - `org.policy.read`

ids.title: ids
ids.description: Defines the ids to query for.

offset.title: offset
offset.description: Starting point for retrieval, in combination of offset used to query a set list of objects.

limit.title: limit
limit.description:
limit is the maximum amount of objects returned. The default is set to 100
 with a maximum of 1000 in the runtime configuration.
 If the limit exceeds the maximum configured Zitadel will throw an error.
 If no limit is present the default is taken.

asc.title: asc
asc.description:
Asc is the sorting order. If true the list is sorted ascending, if false
 the list is sorted descending. The default is descending.

totalResult.title: total_result
totalResult.description: Absolute number of objects matching the query, regardless of applied limit.

appliedLimit.title: applied_limit
appliedLimit.description: Applied limit from query, defines maximum amount of objects per request, to compare if all objects are returned.

sequence.title: sequence
sequence.description:
sequence represents the order of events. It's always counting

 on read: the sequence of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description:
change_date is the timestamp when the object was changed

 on read: the timestamp of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

resourceOwner.title: resource_owner
resourceOwner.description: resource_owner is the organization or instance_id an object belongs to

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: creation_date is the timestamp where the first operation on the object was made

hideLoginNameSuffix.title: hide_login_name_suffix
hideLoginNameSuffix.description: hides the org suffix on the login form if the scope \"urn:zitadel:iam:org:domain:primary:{domainname}\" is set

resourceOwnerType.title: resource_owner_type
resourceOwnerType.description: resource_owner_type returns if the setting is managed on the organization or on the instance

organizationId.title: organization_id
organizationId.description: Organization ID in which this settings are set.

deletionDate.title: deletion_date
deletionDate.description: The timestamp of the deletion of the organization settings.

resourceOwnerType.title: resource_owner_type
resourceOwnerType.description: resource_owner_type returns if the setting is managed on the organization or on the instance

resourceOwnerType.title: resource_owner_type
resourceOwnerType.description: resource_owner_type returns if the setting is managed on the organization or on the instance

sortingColumn.title: sorting_column
sortingColumn.description: The field the result is sorted by. The default is the creation date. Beware that if you change this, your result pagination might be inconsistent.

resourceOwnerType.title: resource_owner_type
resourceOwnerType.description: resource_owner_type returns if the settings is managed on the organization or on the instance

allowDomainDiscovery.title: allow_domain_discovery
allowDomainDiscovery.description: If set to true, the suffix (@domain.com) of an unknown username input on the login screen will be matched against the org domains and will redirect to the registration of that organization on success.

resourceOwnerType.title: resource_owner_type
resourceOwnerType.description: resource_owner_type returns if the settings is managed on the organization or on the instance

zitadel.settings.v2beta.OrganizationScop.title: OrganizationScopedUsernamesFilter
zitadel.settings.v2beta.OrganizationScop.description: Query for organization settings with specific scopes usernames.

organizationId.title: organization_id
organizationId.description: The unique identifier of the organization the settings belong to.

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: The timestamp of the organization settings creation.

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description: The timestamp of the last change to the organization settings.

organizationScopedUsernames.title: organization_scoped_usernames
organizationScopedUsernames.description: Defines if the usernames have to be unique in the organization context.

resourceOwnerType.title: resource_owner_type
resourceOwnerType.description: resource_owner_type returns if the settings is managed on the organization or on the instance

maxAgeDays.title: max_age_days
maxAgeDays.description: Amount of days after which a password will expire. The user will be forced to change the password on the following authentication.

expireWarnDays.title: expire_warn_days
expireWarnDays.description: Amount of days after which the user should be notified of the upcoming expiry. Zitadel will not notify the user.

resourceOwnerType.title: resource_owner_type
resourceOwnerType.description: resource_owner_type returns if the settings is managed on the organization or on the instance

organizationId.title: organization_id
organizationId.description: Organization ID in which this settings are set.

organizationScopedUsernames.title: organization_scoped_usernames
organizationScopedUsernames.description: Force the usernames in the organization to be unique, only possible to set if the existing users already have unique usernames in the organization context.

setDate.title: set_date
setDate.description: The timestamp of the set of the organization settings.

logoUrl.title: logo_url
logoUrl.description: url where the logo is served

iconUrl.title: icon_url
iconUrl.description: url where the icon is served
